citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Context-free grammars describe how words are combined into phrases and clauses, and can represent much of the syntactic structure of natural language, but don't handle things like subject-verb agreement well.
